tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall address "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
config firewall address
    edit "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
        set uuid 58a0fa26-295b-51f1-4eff-a3380b7173d9
        set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid f9d90c40-2937-51f1-d69d-ea2eba750bce
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "ALLOW-UBUNTU-LAN-ICMP-WEB"
        set uuid 64317b36-295b-51f1-5908-c2dd9c41e7fb
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "PING" "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic all
next
    edit 3
        set name "BLOCK-UBUNTU-OTHER-EGRESS"
        set uuid 6444fe9a-295b-51f1-cfe8-d6dd6bbeba53
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer-192.168.1.3"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set logtraffic all
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # move 3 before 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end
